title: Discovery Builder Agent

seo.title: AI Discovery Builder Agent for Law Firms | Dodonai
seo.description: Draft interrogatories, requests for production, and requests for admission tuned to the case theory. Every request defensible, every objection anticipated.

hero.headline: AI Discovery Builder Agent
hero.subheadline: Drafts the interrogatories, requests for production, and requests for admission your case theory needs. Every request scoped to survive an objection. The first round of discovery becomes a focused instrument instead of a template-driven shotgun.
bullets: Interrogatories drafted to the case theory and the matter facts
Requests for production scoped to survive overbreadth objections
Requests for admission targeted to lock in defenses or admissions
Anticipated objections noted with the responsive position
hero.guarantee: Blueprint refunded if we don't leave you with a clear path forward.

scenario.heading: The discovery you would have built from the template
paragraphs: A new commercial litigation matter goes into discovery. In the old workflow, the associate pulls the firm's standard interrogatories template, edits it lightly for the case, and sends it. Half the responses come back as objections to overbreadth. The Discovery Builder drafts a tailored set tuned to the actual case theory and the defendant's pleadings: 18 interrogatories instead of 30, 12 requests for production scoped narrowly enough to survive, 8 requests for admission targeted at locking in the defenses pled. The objections drop; the responses come back useful.

whatItDoes.heading: What the Discovery Builder does
bullets: Drafts interrogatories tuned to the case theory and the matter facts
Drafts requests for production scoped to survive overbreadth and proportionality objections
Drafts requests for admission targeted at locking in pled defenses or admissions
Anticipates likely objections and notes the responsive position
Produces the matter-specific drafts in your firm's preferred format

integrations: Practice management system for matter facts and pleadings
Document management system for prior discovery and exhibits
Microsoft Word or Google Docs for the draft delivery

safety.heading: Safety posture
paragraphs: Drafts are reviewed by the responsible attorney before service. The agent doesn't serve discovery, doesn't make scope decisions, doesn't decide whether to take a particular litigation posture. It builds the working draft so the attorney's time goes to strategy rather than typing.

faq.question: How does it know what objections to anticipate?
faq.answer: The agent reads the local rules and the controlling case law on discovery scope for the venue. For courts with active proportionality doctrine, the drafts get tighter; for courts with broader allowances, the drafts can ask for more. The Build phase calibrates this per jurisdiction.

faq.question: What about complex multi-party discovery?
faq.answer: For matters with multiple defendants or third-party witnesses, the agent drafts party-specific discovery rather than blasting the same set to everyone. Each set reflects the role and the available knowledge of the recipient.
